case_title: SARA B. BRODY VS. PHILLIP C. HARRIS ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 110.00 - SERVED NOV-10-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, PHILLIP C.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRODY, SARA B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARRIS, PHILLIP C. BYRON, STEPHEN A. $9,472.00 PRINCIPAL, $275.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,747.00, "INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE SPECIAL DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $5,000.00 UNDER CIVIL CODE SECTION 1942.4(B)(1) AND PUNATIVE DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,000.00.00 UNDER CIVIL CODE SECTION 1942.5(F)(2) OF THE CIVIL CODE." PER JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BRODY, SARA B. AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, PHILLIP C. BYRON, STEPHEN A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRODY, SARA B.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-29-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-29-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. 2 DEFENDANTS ARE NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-29-2014 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT HARRIS, PHILLIP C. MAILED TO RESPONDENT BRODY, SARA B.
